from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download
print\('Downloading Intel Llama-3.2-3B INT4 for NPU...'\)
snapshot_download\(
    repo_id='Intel/llama-3.2-3b-instruct-int4-ov',
    local_dir='C:/Users/louis/Desktop/FinAI/models/llama-3.2-3b-int4-ov',
    ignore_patterns=['*.msgpack','*.h5','flax_*']
\)
print\('Done!'\)
" 2>&1 | tail -5)
